BackstoryDef.title: Amnesia detective
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] lived a rough life as a well-renowned cop and detective before being broken up with by the love of [PAWN_possessive] life, which spiraled them into a deep depression. Shortly after taking on a case, [PAWN_nameDef] went to a costal inn, drinking [PAWN_possessive]self into an alcohol-induced amnesia. Not remembering who [PAWN_pronoun] were or why [PAWN_pronoun] were there, [PAWN_nameDef] went on in life, looking for a new purpose in life.
